auth.unauthorized: You must be signed in to access this resource.

dashboard.headline: ApertureCore
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Create view-only dashboards, stats, and cards from your own database.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Redirecting to your OpenID Connect provider.
login.refreshHint: If nothing happens, refresh the page.

oidcNotConfigured.title: OIDC is not configured yet.
oidcNotConfigured.description: Set your provider endpoints and NUXT_OIDC_PROVIDERS_OIDC_CLIENT_ID in .env.development, then restart the app.

new.headline: Connections
new.title: New database connection
new.description: Add a database connection and verify that ApertureCore can reach it securely.

card.title: Connection details
card.description: Enter the credentials required to test the database connection.

connectionName.label: Connection name
connectionName.description: A friendly name for this connection.

errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to test a database connection.
errors.rateLimited: Too many database connection tests. Please wait and try again.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.connectionNameInvalid: Connection name must be a string.
errors.portInvalid: Port must be a positive integer.
errors.invalidInput: The database connection request is invalid.
errors.unsupportedDatabaseType: This database type is not supported yet.
errors.databaseNotFound: The specified database could not be found.
errors.connectionFailed: ApertureCore could not reach the database server.
errors.sslRequired: The database server requires SSL or compatible TLS settings.
errors.notImplemented: This database test is not implemented yet.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while testing the database connection.
